sql.trim: t1.ID, t1.USER_ID, t1.DEPT_ID, t1.PARTY_ID, t1.USER_CODE, t1.SEX, t1.BIRTHDAY, t1.NATION, t1.ORIGN, t1.BIRTH_PLACE, t1.EDUCATION_SECTOR, t1.JOIN_PARTY, t1.EDUCATION_LEVEL, t1.JOINPARTY_DEPT, t1.PARTY_TYPE, t1.INTRODUCER, t1.GRADUATION_TIME, t1.WORK_TIME, t1.POST, t1.PROFESSIONAL_RANK, t1.CATEGORY, t1.JOINZG_TYPE, t1.REGULAR_DATE, t1.REGULAR_TYPE, t1.JOINBRANCH_TYPE, t1.IDCARD, t1.ADDRESS, t1.TEL, t1.REGISTER_ADDRESS, t1.PARTY_MONEY, t1.ONOFF_JOB, t1.BRANCH_POST, t1.CREATED_BY, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.VERSION, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.ATTRIBUTE_01, t1.ATTRIBUTE_02, t1.ATTRIBUTE_03, t1.ATTRIBUTE_04, t1.ATTRIBUTE_05, t1.ATTRIBUTE_06, t1.ATTRIBUTE_07, t1.ATTRIBUTE_08, t1.ATTRIBUTE_09, t1.ATTRIBUTE_10, t1.ATTRIBUTE_11, t1.ATTRIBUTE_12, t1.ATTRIBUTE_13, t1.ATTRIBUTE_14, t1.ATTRIBUTE_15, t1.ATTRIBUTE_16, t1.ATTRIBUTE_17, t1.ATTRIBUTE_18, t1.ATTRIBUTE_19, t1.ATTRIBUTE_20, t1.STATUS,

mapper.select:
select
from PARTY_MEMBER t1
user_id in ((select id from sys_user where name like concat(concat('%',#{bean.userIdAlias}),'%')))

select
from PARTY_MEMBER t1
and t1.id in
#{item}
order by t1.creation_date desc
select t1.party_id,t1.party_name from PARTY_MEMBER_ORGANIZATION_VIEW t1 where t1.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert:
insert into PARTY_MEMBER
ID,
USER_ID,
DEPT_ID,
PARTY_ID,
USER_CODE,
SEX,
BIRTHDAY,
NATION,
ORIGN,
BIRTH_PLACE,
EDUCATION_SECTOR,
JOIN_PARTY,
EDUCATION_LEVEL,
JOINPARTY_DEPT,
PARTY_TYPE,
INTRODUCER,
GRADUATION_TIME,
WORK_TIME,
POST,
PROFESSIONAL_RANK,
CATEGORY,
JOINZG_TYPE,
REGULAR_DATE,
REGULAR_TYPE,
JOINBRANCH_TYPE,
IDCARD,
ADDRESS,
TEL,
REGISTER_ADDRESS,
PARTY_MONEY,
ONOFF_JOB,
BRANCH_POST,
CREATED_BY,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
VERSION,
ORG_IDENTITY,
CREATED_DEPT,
ATTRIBUTE_01,
ATTRIBUTE_02,
ATTRIBUTE_03,
ATTRIBUTE_04,
ATTRIBUTE_05,
ATTRIBUTE_06,
ATTRIBUTE_07,
ATTRIBUTE_08,
ATTRIBUTE_09,
ATTRIBUTE_10,
ATTRIBUTE_11,
ATTRIBUTE_12,
ATTRIBUTE_13,
ATTRIBUTE_14,
ATTRIBUTE_15,
ATTRIBUTE_16,
ATTRIBUTE_17,
ATTRIBUTE_18,
ATTRIBUTE_19,
ATTRIBUTE_20,
STATUS,
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{userCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{birthday,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{orign,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{birthPlace,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{educationSector,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{joinParty,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{educationLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{joinpartyDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{introducer,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{graduationTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{workTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{post,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{professionalRank,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{category,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{joinzgType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{regularDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{regularType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{joinbranchType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{idcard,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{address,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{tel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{registerAddress,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{onoffJob,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{branchPost,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{attribute12,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{attribute13,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute14,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute15,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{attribute16,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute17,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute18,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute19,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute20,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

insert into PARTY_MEMBER( ID , USER_ID , DEPT_ID , PARTY_ID , USER_CODE , SEX , BIRTHDAY , NATION , ORIGN , BIRTH_PLACE , EDUCATION_SECTOR , JOIN_PARTY , EDUCATION_LEVEL , JOINPARTY_DEPT , PARTY_TYPE , INTRODUCER , GRADUATION_TIME , WORK_TIME , POST , PROFESSIONAL_RANK , CATEGORY , JOINZG_TYPE , REGULAR_DATE , REGULAR_TYPE , JOINBRANCH_TYPE , IDCARD , ADDRESS , TEL , REGISTER_ADDRESS , PARTY_MONEY , ONOFF_JOB , BRANCH_POST , CREATED_BY , CREATION_DATE , LAST_UPDATED_BY , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , LAST_UPDATE_IP , VERSION , ORG_IDENTITY , CREATED_DEPT , ATTRIBUTE_01 , ATTRIBUTE_02 , ATTRIBUTE_03 , ATTRIBUTE_04 , ATTRIBUTE_05 , ATTRIBUTE_06 , ATTRIBUTE_07 , ATTRIBUTE_08 , ATTRIBUTE_09 , ATTRIBUTE_10 , ATTRIBUTE_11 , ATTRIBUTE_12 , ATTRIBUTE_13 , ATTRIBUTE_14 , ATTRIBUTE_15 , ATTRIBUTE_16 , ATTRIBUTE_17 , ATTRIBUTE_18 , ATTRIBUTE_19 , ATTRIBUTE_20 , STATUS )
select #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.userCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.birthday,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.orign,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.birthPlace,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.educationSector,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.joinParty,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.educationLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.joinpartyDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.introducer,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.graduationTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.workTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.post,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.professionalRank,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.category,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.joinzgType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.regularDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.regularType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.joinbranchType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.idcard,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.address,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.tel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.registerAddress,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.onoffJob,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.branchPost,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attribute12,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.attribute13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute15,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attribute16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute18,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute19,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute20,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.status,jdbcType = VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update PARTY_MEMBER
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_ID = #{partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
USER_CODE = #{userCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
SEX = #{sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
BIRTHDAY = #{birthday,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
NATION = #{nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ORIGN = #{orign,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
BIRTH_PLACE = #{birthPlace,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
EDUCATION_SECTOR = #{educationSector,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
JOIN_PARTY = #{joinParty,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
EDUCATION_LEVEL = #{educationLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
JOINPARTY_DEPT = #{joinpartyDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_TYPE = #{partyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
INTRODUCER = #{introducer,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
GRADUATION_TIME = #{graduationTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
WORK_TIME = #{workTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
POST = #{post,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PROFESSIONAL_RANK = #{professionalRank,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CATEGORY = #{category,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
JOINZG_TYPE = #{joinzgType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
REGULAR_DATE = #{regularDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
REGULAR_TYPE = #{regularType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
JOINBRANCH_TYPE = #{joinbranchType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
IDCARD = #{idcard,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ADDRESS = #{address,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TEL = #{tel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
REGISTER_ADDRESS = #{registerAddress,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_MONEY = #{partyMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
ONOFF_JOB = #{onoffJob,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
BRANCH_POST = #{branchPost,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
VERSION = version+1,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_11 = #{attribute11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTRIBUTE_12 = #{attribute12,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
ATTRIBUTE_13 = #{attribute13,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_14 = #{attribute14,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_15 = #{attribute15,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTRIBUTE_16 = #{attribute16,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_17 = #{attribute17,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_18 = #{attribute18,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_19 = #{attribute19,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_20 = #{attribute20,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
STATUS = #{status,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update PARTY_MEMBER set ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_ID = #{partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_CODE = #{userCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SEX = #{sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , BIRTHDAY = #{birthday,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , NATION = #{nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORIGN = #{orign,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , BIRTH_PLACE = #{birthPlace,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , EDUCATION_SECTOR = #{educationSector,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JOIN_PARTY = #{joinParty,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , EDUCATION_LEVEL = #{educationLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JOINPARTY_DEPT = #{joinpartyDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_TYPE = #{partyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , INTRODUCER = #{introducer,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , GRADUATION_TIME = #{graduationTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , WORK_TIME = #{workTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , POST = #{post,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PROFESSIONAL_RANK = #{professionalRank,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CATEGORY = #{category,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JOINZG_TYPE = #{joinzgType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , REGULAR_DATE = #{regularDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , REGULAR_TYPE = #{regularType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JOINBRANCH_TYPE = #{joinbranchType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , IDCARD = #{idcard,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ADDRESS = #{address,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TEL = #{tel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , REGISTER_ADDRESS = #{registerAddress,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_MONEY = #{partyMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , ONOFF_JOB = #{onoffJob,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , BRANCH_POST = #{branchPost,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_11 = #{attribute11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTRIBUTE_12 = #{attribute12,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , ATTRIBUTE_13 = #{attribute13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_14 = #{attribute14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_15 = #{attribute15,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTRIBUTE_16 = #{attribute16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_17 = #{attribute17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_18 = #{attribute18,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_19 = #{attribute19,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_20 = #{attribute20,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , STATUS = #{status,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update PARTY_MEMBER set ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_ID = #{item.userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_ID = #{item.deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_ID = #{item.partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_CODE = #{item.userCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SEX = #{item.sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , BIRTHDAY = #{item.birthday,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , NATION = #{item.nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORIGN = #{item.orign,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , BIRTH_PLACE = #{item.birthPlace,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , EDUCATION_SECTOR = #{item.educationSector,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JOIN_PARTY = #{item.joinParty,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , EDUCATION_LEVEL = #{item.educationLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JOINPARTY_DEPT = #{item.joinpartyDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_TYPE = #{item.partyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , INTRODUCER = #{item.introducer,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , GRADUATION_TIME = #{item.graduationTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , WORK_TIME = #{item.workTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , POST = #{item.post,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PROFESSIONAL_RANK = #{item.professionalRank,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CATEGORY = #{item.category,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JOINZG_TYPE = #{item.joinzgType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , REGULAR_DATE = #{item.regularDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , REGULAR_TYPE = #{item.regularType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JOINBRANCH_TYPE = #{item.joinbranchType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , IDCARD = #{item.idcard,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ADDRESS = #{item.address,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TEL = #{item.tel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , REGISTER_ADDRESS = #{item.registerAddress,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_MONEY = #{item.partyMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , ONOFF_JOB = #{item.onoffJob,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , BRANCH_POST = #{item.branchPost,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{item.attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{item.attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{item.attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{item.attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{item.attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{item.attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{item.attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{item.attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{item.attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{item.attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_11 = #{item.attribute11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTRIBUTE_12 = #{item.attribute12,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , ATTRIBUTE_13 = #{item.attribute13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_14 = #{item.attribute14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_15 = #{item.attribute15,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTRIBUTE_16 = #{item.attribute16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_17 = #{item.attribute17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_18 = #{item.attribute18,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_19 = #{item.attribute19,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_20 = #{item.attribute20,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , STATUS = #{item.status,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}

mapper.update: update PARTY_MEMBER t set t.party_id = #{partyId} where t.user_id = #{userId}
update PARTY_MEMBER t set t.party_id = #{partyId} , t.attribute_01 = #{partyGroupId} where t.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select t.party_name as "name",count(*) as "value" from PARTY_MEMBER_ORGANIZATION_VIEW t group by t.party_name having t.party_name is not null
mapper.update:
update PARTY_MEMBER
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_ID = #{partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
USER_CODE = #{userCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
SEX = #{sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
BIRTHDAY = #{birthday,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
NATION = #{nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ORIGN = #{orign,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
BIRTH_PLACE = #{birthPlace,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
EDUCATION_SECTOR = #{educationSector,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
JOIN_PARTY = #{joinParty,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
EDUCATION_LEVEL = #{educationLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
JOINPARTY_DEPT = #{joinpartyDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_TYPE = #{partyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
INTRODUCER = #{introducer,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
GRADUATION_TIME = #{graduationTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
WORK_TIME = #{workTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
POST = #{post,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PROFESSIONAL_RANK = #{professionalRank,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CATEGORY = #{category,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
JOINZG_TYPE = #{joinzgType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
REGULAR_TYPE = #{regularType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
JOINBRANCH_TYPE = #{joinbranchType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
IDCARD = #{idcard,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ADDRESS = #{address,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TEL = #{tel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
REGISTER_ADDRESS = #{registerAddress,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_MONEY = #{partyMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
ONOFF_JOB = #{onoffJob,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
BRANCH_POST = #{branchPost,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
VERSION = version+1,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_11 = #{attribute11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTRIBUTE_12 = #{attribute12,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
ATTRIBUTE_13 = #{attribute13,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_14 = #{attribute14,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_15 = #{attribute15,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTRIBUTE_16 = #{attribute16,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_17 = #{attribute17,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_18 = #{attribute18,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_19 = #{attribute19,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_20 = #{attribute20,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
STATUS = #{status,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
where USER_CODE = #{userCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select
from PARTY_MEMBER t1
user_id in ((select id from sys_user where name like concat(concat('%',#{bean.userIdAlias}),'%')))

select
from PARTY_MEMBER t1 where t1.status = '0'

select
from PARTY_MEMBER t1
t1.status = '0'
and user_id in ((select id from sys_user where name like concat(concat('%',#{bean.userIdAlias}),'%')))
